context: You will get stuck - someone speaks too fast, you miss a word, you take a wrong turn. The difference between a panic and a non-event is a few phrases that keep the exchange going instead of ending it. These are your safety net.
explanation: Reach for these three first: "no entiendo" (I don't understand) tells the other person to try again, "puede repetir?" (can you repeat?) asks them to say it once more, and "mas despacio, por favor" (more slowly, please) usually fixes the problem on its own.
